_metadata.title: Authorised Representatives of Providers of General-Purpose AI Models

primary_official_source.name: EUR-Lex -- Official Journal of the European Union

obligations.source_quote: Prior to placing a general-purpose AI model on the Union market, providers established in third countries shall, by written mandate, appoint an authorised representative which is established in the Union.
obligations.scope_limitation: Only applies to providers established in third countries (outside EU)

decomposed_atoms.description: Third-country providers must appoint an EU-based authorised representative
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL appoint an authorised representative established in the Union by written mandate

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for authorised representative documentation, mandate records
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether the provider is a third-country provider and whether appointment is valid

obligations.source_quote: The provider shall enable its authorised representative to perform the tasks specified in the mandate received from the provider.
obligations.scope_limitation: Only applies when authorised representative is appointed

decomposed_atoms.description: Provider must enable the authorised representative to perform mandate tasks
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL enable its authorised representative to perform the tasks specified in the mandate

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for evidence that representative has necessary access, resources and information
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether the provider has adequately enabled the representative

obligations.source_quote: The authorised representative shall perform the tasks specified in the mandate received from the provider. It shall provide a copy of the mandate to the AI Office upon request, in one of the official languages of the institutions of the Union.
obligations.scope_limitation: Only applies when authorised representative is appointed

decomposed_atoms.description: Authorised representative must perform mandate tasks
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL perform the tasks specified in the mandate

decomposed_atoms.description: Copy of mandate available to AI Office on request
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL provide a copy of the mandate to the AI Office upon request

decomposed_atoms.description: Mandate must empower representative to verify documentation and compliance
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Mandate SHALL empower representative to: (a) verify Annex XI documentation, (b) keep documentation 10 years, (c) provide information to AI Office, (d) cooperate with authorities

automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether mandate covers all required tasks

obligations.source_quote: The mandate shall empower the authorised representative to be addressed, in addition to or instead of the provider, by the AI Office or the competent authorities, on all issues related to ensuring compliance with this Regulation.
obligations.scope_limitation: Only applies when authorised representative is appointed

decomposed_atoms.description: Mandate must empower representative to be addressed by authorities on compliance matters
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL empower the authorised representative to be addressed by the AI Office or competent authorities on all compliance issues

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check mandate documentation for addressability clause
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether the mandate adequately empowers the representative

obligations.source_quote: The authorised representative shall terminate the mandate if it considers or has reason to consider the provider to be acting contrary to its obligations pursuant to this Regulation. In such a case, it shall also immediately inform the AI Office about the termination of the mandate and the reasons therefor.
obligations.scope_limitation: Only applies when authorised representative is appointed

decomposed_atoms.description: Representative must terminate mandate if provider acts contrary to Regulation
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL terminate mandate and inform AI Office if provider is non-compliant

obligations.source_quote: The obligation set out in this Article shall not apply to providers of general-purpose AI models that are released under a free and open-source licence that allows for the access, usage, modification, and distribution of the model, and whose parameters, including the weights, the information on the model architecture, and the information on model usage, are made publicly available, unless the general-purpose AI models present systemic risks.
obligations.scope_limitation: Open-source GPAI models exempt unless systemic risk

decomposed_atoms.description: Open-source GPAI exempt from Art. 54 unless systemic risk
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Art. 54 SHALL NOT apply to open-source GPAI (unless systemic risk)

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check license type and systemic risk classification
